titleStmt.title: Capitula 2 Samuhel / 2 Regum in Tournai, Bibliothèque du Séminaire, MS 1

publicationStmt.p: Digital editions of summaries in Medieval Bibles

listBibl.head: bibliographical abbreviations

bibl.author: Donatien de Bruyne
bibl.title: Sommaires, divisions et rubriques de la Bible latine

bibl.editor: Monachi abbatiae pontificiae Sancti Hieronymi in Urbe
bibl.title: Biblia Sacra iuxta Latinam vulgatam versionem ad codicum fidem... Liber Samuhelis ex interpretatione sancti Hieronymi cum praefatione et variis capitulorum seriebus

listBibl.bibl: P.-M. Bogaert, A. De Coster, J.-B. Lebigue et alii LM 1. Biblia sacra, dite « Bible de Lobbes », in Séminaire de Tournai : histoire, bâtiments, collections M. Maillard-Luypaert Leuven 2008 pp. 77-101

tagsDecl.rendition: the digital reproduction is b/w, impossible to determine color

front.p:
The series of capitula published here is unknown to both de Bruyne and the Benedictine edition of the Vulgate. Since it is mainly based on de Bruyne's B series (as observed by P.-M. Bogaert in Bogaert et alii, p. 81; see also below), we label it B(a)_dobips. Among the manuscripts recorded in the DOBiPS database, it occurs only in To (Tournai, Bibliothèque du Séminaire, MS 1), the first volume (the second being lost) of the so-called Bible of Lobbes, produced at the eponymous Belgian abbey in the late 11th century.
As in the case of 3 Regum (here) and 4 Regum (here), B(a) draws both from de Bruyne's A and B series to 2 Regum. While some capitula are borrowed almost literally from A (for example, cap. 27 and 42, which correspond to cap. 49 and 68 of A), the core of B(a) is a reworking of the B series, each capitulum of which is split into two or more titles, sometimes with additional details.
For example, from B's cap. 2, B(a) draws four titles:
B, cap. 2:
De reditu dauid in hebron ubi secundo unctus est et de abner et hisboseth et ioab et de proelio
ubi luserunt pueri et asahel occubuit
B(a), cap. 29-32
29 De reditu dauid in hebron ubi secundo unctus est
30 De abner et hisboseth filio saul et de ioab
31 De proelio in gabaon ubi luserunt pueri
32 De occubitu asahel fratris ioab percusso ab abner
The numbering (27-69) continues that of book 1, where the standard B series to 1 Regum (de Bruyne, p. 103-105) – which counts 26 chapters – is employed.
The point in the text of 2 Regum where To places the chapter number corresponding to each capitulum can be accessed either by clicking on the two-page icon next to each capitulum number, or by clicking on the "Passi paralleli" thumbnail (in the right-hand panel of the "Testo di lettura" screen).

item.title: Nuntium sceleris iubet dauid ante se interfici pro morte saul
De planctu dauid quomodo luxit saul et ionathan
De reditu dauid in hebron ubi secundo unctus est
De abner et hisboseth filio saul et de ioab
De proelio in gabaon ubi luserunt pueri
De occubitu asahel fratris ioab percusso ab abner

bibl.title: 2 Rg 3:2 nati quoque [natique To] sunt filii

item.title: De filiis dauid in hebron natis et quomodo recepit michol
De abner ab ioab interfecto et de fletu regis dauid super eo
De morte hisboseth filii saul et ultione pro eo facta
De cunctis tribubus secutis dauid et quomodo ingressus est syon

bibl.title: 2 Rg 5:11 misit quoque hiram rex tyri

item.title: De tyri artificibus et lignis et de uxoribus uel filiis qui nati sunt dauid
De duobus proeliis quibus dauid percussit phylisteos
De arca adducta in hierusalem et de percussione oza

bibl.title: 2 Rg 7:1 factum est autem cum sedisset

item.title: De nathan propheta ubi prohibuit dauid ȩdificare templum et prophetauit de christo et dauid gratias egit deo

bibl.title: 2 Rg 8:1 factum est autem post haec

item.title: Quomodo dauid omnes in circuitu humiliauerit nationes
Thou rex emath misit ioram filium suum cum muneribus ad dauid
De mifiboseth filio ionathȩ et de familia serui sui sibȩ

bibl.title: 2 Rg 10:1 factum est autem post haec

item.title: De annon rege ammon quomodo illusit pueris dauid

bibl.title: 2 Rg 11:1 factum est ergo [autem To] vertente anno

item.title: De bersabee bethsabee uxore uriȩ et de interitu ipsius uriȩ
Parabola de paupere et diuite dauid per nathan a domino data
De morte pueri de stupro nati
De natiuitate salomonis et de urbe rabbath a dauid capta

bibl.title: 2 Rg 13:1 factum est autem post haec

item.title: Quȩ de amnon primogenito dauid et de thamar memorantur

bibl.title: 2 Rg 13:23 factum est autem post tempus biennii

item.title: De absalon quomodo interfecit amnon et de fuga eius in iessur
De muliere thecuite quȩ pro eo dauid locuta est
De absalon pulchritudine et quos habuerit filios
Quomodo patrem regno expulit absalon
De leuitis et arca reducta et de chusai amico dauid
De semei filio gera et accessu chusai ad absalon
De concubinis consilio achitofel uiolatis
De consilio achitofel et chusai dato absalon et de achimaas et ionathan exploratoribus dauid
Diuidit exercitum dauid tribus ducibus et absalon precipit reseruari
De bello ubi absalon periit

bibl.title: 2 Rg 18:32 dixit autem rex ad chusi

item.title: Quomodo dauid luxit absalon et ioab obiurgauit dauid
De reditu dauid in hierusalem et recuperatione regni

bibl.title: 2 Rg 20:1 accidit quoque [autem To] ut ibi esset

item.title: De siba qui cum parte populi rebellauit contra dauid
De amasa quem interfecit ioab
De fame quȩ accidit pro gabaonitis quos ultus est dauid in septem crucifixis de stirpe saul

bibl.title: 2 Rg 21:15 factum est autem rursum proelium

item.title: De proelio phylistinorum in quo dauid patuit discrimini et de reliquis bellis fortiter actis
De cantico dauid et prophetia de christo
De uiris fortissimis in proeliis cum dauid et de eorum magnanimitate et uirtutibus
De indignatione diuina aduersum dauid pro eo quod populum iusserat numerari

bibl.title: 2 Rg 24:11 et sermo domini factus est

item.title: De optione per gad uidentem tribus modis oblata et de interfectione LXXta milium per angelum et de sacrificio oblato a dauid in area areuna iebusei
